items.name: Crimson Wings
items.description: Your wings already exist. All you have to do is fly!

items.name: Phoenix Backpack
items.description: Get the Phoenix Backpack to get FREE power-ups in Roblox High School!

items.name: Cobalt Wings
items.description: Your greatness is waiting, now SOAR!

items.name: Wings of Duality
items.description: The Darkness? The Light? Why choose, and split the difference.

items.name: Black Iron Cape
items.description: The blackest cape is not the lightest cape.

items.name: Overseer Wings of Terror
items.description: Take up the wings of darkness.

items.name: Gilded Wings of Glory
items.description: These fabulous wings aren't made of wax! Go ahead- fly as close to the sun as you like! They're the genuine article!

items.name: Glorious Cape of Stars
items.description: Oh my, it's full of stars.

items.name: One Shoulder Canvas Backpack
items.description: For those who prefer to wear a backpack on one shoulder, we've got you covered.

items.name: Commander Crow's Wings
items.description: "The bird war, the bird attack, plague - call it what you like. They're amassing out there someplace and they'll be back. You can count on it..."

items.name: Emerald Wings
items.description: Take me to the sky / If only I could fly freely freely

items.name: Wings of the Dawncleaver
items.description: Mythical...AND magical. Equip this item to hatch eggs 20% faster in Dragon Adventures. Item ability does not stack.

items.name: Guardian of the Night Cape
items.description: You watch so they don't have to.

items.name: Cape of Midnight's Wisdom
items.description: "But what I tell you in the evening /By the morning won't make sense"

items.name: Backpack - George Ezra
items.description: Backpack made of worn-in leather with elements of the concert peeking out.

items.name: Violet Spring Butterfly Wings
items.description: Butterfly in the sky.  This item came out of the Basket of Delicate Flight on March 24th, 2016.

items.name: Mid-Summer Starry Wings
items.description: Smoke rings in a galaxy, an endless flight through time.

items.name: Gold Mechaknight Wings
items.description: Birds fly, but heroes soar.

items.name: Wings of Liberty
items.description: "Where liberty dwells, there is my country."

items.name: Wings of the Divine Butterfly
items.description: Though these wings are as beautiful as they are delicate, don’t underestimate their strength.

items.name: Backpacking Traveler Backpack
items.description: Roads? Where we're going we don't need 'em.

items.name: Interstellar Wings
items.description: Soar on the solar winds!

items.name: Vans Obstacle Backpack with Skateboard
items.description: Never miss an opportunity to skate in style by taking your board wherever you go with the Vans Obstacle backpack and skateboard. Get ready to drop in and explore Vans World with this collectable item.

items.name: LNX Neon Wings - Lil Nas X
items.description: If I took you everywhere, then well, you wouldn't know how to walk.

items.name: Magnificent Robot Wings
items.description: With some oil and polish, you can sore through the skies in stealth and glamour.

items.name: Glorious Moth Wings
items.description: These wings will make you into a true nocturnal creature, finally.

items.name: WDW Backpack - Why Don’t We
items.description: Stylish backpack for all your concert goodies!

items.name: Ninja Cape of Shadows
items.description: Now with 45% less swooshing noises for extra silence.

items.name: Adventurer Backpack
items.description: A handy pack for the sophisticated, danger seeker.

items.name: Giant Kingfisher Wings
items.description: Fly with grace, speed, and beauty.
